reasoning: The control SI-4(23) focuses on system monitoring using host-based devices, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through several mechanisms. Kubernetes audit logging provides detailed monitoring of API server interactions, which is akin to host-based monitoring. Admission controllers can enforce security policies that ensure pods and workloads adhere to security standards, providing a form of monitoring and control. Pod Security Standards can enforce baseline security configurations, ensuring that pods are monitored for compliance with security policies. NetworkPolicies can be configured to monitor and control network traffic, providing visibility and control over communications within the cluster.
